$comment: Allowlist of intentional sync-over-async (.GetAwaiter().GetResult()) call-sites in Qobuzarr. Category A = host requires synchronous entry-point; Category B = avoidable (not listed); Category C = test/helper utility.

entries.reason: IDisposable.Dispose() is inherently synchronous. The class implements IDisposable to satisfy the Lidarr host DownloadClientBase lifecycle; async cleanup is delegated to DisposeAsync() but the sync entry-point cannot be avoided.

IQobuzApiClient declares 'void ClearSession()' -- a synchronous interface contract. The primary path uses a synchronous concrete.ClearSession(); this async fallback is only reached when the session manager is not the concrete SessionManager type. Cannot be made async without breaking the interface contract.
